data.title: Join AvionTEq at MRO Americas 2026 for Exclusive Deals, Live Solutions, and a Chance to Win a UTS100
data.description: AvionTEq, a global distributor of avionics test equipment, will be at MRO Americas 2026 from April 21-23, 2026 in Orlando, FL. Head to Booth 5300 for cutting-edge avionics, show specials, and a chance to win a ULBTEq UTS100 Underwater Locator Beacon Ultrasonic Testing. Special pricing and rentals on a wide range of avionic products will be available exclusively at this year’s event.

data.title: The Edge Fitness Clubs Manchester Introduces New Infrared Yoga & Pilates Studio at End of April
data.description: A wellness-focused studio in Manchester, Connecticut, set to open soon, was previously a cinema room. The facility, run by The Edge Fitness Clubs, a renowned gym chain with a reputation for affordable pricing, will offer services like red light therapy and heated classes. The transformation of the space signifies a shift towards health and wellness services, reflecting a growing trend in the fitness industry. The initiative aims to attract diverse clientele seeking unique experiences, with the studio projected to accommodate a significant number of individuals seeking wellness services in the region.

data.title: Weekly report share buyback from April 7 to April 10, 2026
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has disclosed the details of its share buybacks in compliance with the relevant regulations. The company repurchased its own shares between April 7, 2026, and April 10, 2026.

data.title: Repurchases of shares by EQT AB during week 15, 2026
data.description: Between April 7th and 10th, 2026, EQT AB (LEI code 213800U7P9GOIRKCTB34) disclosed the repurchase of 252,795 of its own ordinary shares (ISIN: SE0012853455). This action is part of a larger repurchase program allowing for a maximum of 3,005,071 own shares to be bought back.

data.title: Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation Announces Pricing of Tender Offer for Its 6.250% Senior Notes Due 2033
data.description: Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation disclosed on April 13, 2026, that they will be paying a total consideration for their Tender Offer, targeting a maximum of $250 million aggregate principal amount of their 6.250% Senior Notes due 2033. This offer focuses on purchasing outstanding Notes up to the specified Maximum Tender Amount. Pilgrim’s Pride Corporation identified as NASDAQ: PPC released this information.

data.title: DigitalOcean to Participate in Citi AI Summit
data.description: DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) from Broomfield, Colo., specializing in the Agentic Inference Cloud for AI production, shared news of its CEO Paddy Srinivasan joining Citi’s 4th Annual AI Summit for a fireside chat on Wednesday, April 15, at 10:50 a.m. PT / 1:50 p.m. ET. Those interested can access a webcast replay on DigitalOcean’s investor relations site at investors.digitalocean.com. DigitalOcean serves as the Agentic Inference Cloud provider.

data.title: New $0 May Term at St. Thomas University Global Removes Cost Barrier to Starting College
data.description: In Miami Gardens, Florida, on April 13, 2026, St. Thomas University Global, the online undergraduate branch of St. Thomas University, has announced the launch of a $0 May Term for 2026. This initiative aims to provide eligible students with a cost-effective opportunity to start or pursue an online undergraduate degree. This marks a significant step towards making higher education more accessible, with no financial barriers hindering students from advancing their academic goals.
Blackrock Investment Institute turns overweight on US stocks.

data.title: B&G FOODS TEAMSTERS RATIFY STRONG CONTRACT
data.description: In a significant victory for workers in Stoughton, Wisconsin, employees represented by Teamsters Local 120 at B&G Foods have approved a new contract that includes a substantial 19% wage hike and enhanced job security measures. The decision to ratify the contract came shortly after the workforce voted in favor of a potential strike. This development underscores the strength of the negotiated terms and highlights the dedication of the employees and their union in securing improved conditions.

data.title: Two vessels allegedly tied to Iran navigated the Strait of Hormuz before potential blockade by the U.S.
data.description: In recent data, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 5.8%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. Additionally, the economy has shown growth with a GDP increase of 3.5% in the last quarter. This positive trend has resulted in the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. Analysts are attributing this improvement to government policies aimed at stimulating economic activity. The stock market has also responded positively to these developments, with the main index reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Overall, the economic outlook appears to be promising with forecasts suggesting continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: Sienna for Seniors Foundation $1 Million Gift Advances Healthy Aging Research at Ontario Tech University
data.description: A generous contribution will aid in the research of older adult well-being, happiness, engagement, and connection, amplifying efforts to enhance the quality of life for elderly individuals. This funding will provide valuable resources for studying key aspects of the lives of older adults, potentially benefiting a significant portion of the aging population. By focusing on these critical areas, researchers aim to address the needs and challenges faced by older individuals, with the aim of fostering healthier, more fulfilling lives for them. This contribution underscores the importance of understanding and promoting the well-being of older adults, a demographic that continues to grow in size and significance globally.

data.title: CDB Aviation Delivers One Boeing 737-8 to China Southern Airlines
data.description: In Seattle, CDB Aviation, a subsidiary of China Development Bank Financial Leasing, delivered a Boeing 737-8 to China Southern Airlines. This addition brings the total aircraft on lease to China Southern to three, including two Airbus A321-251NXs received earlier in August 2025. The company aims to bolster its fleet, with plans for further expansions in the future.
